description: Configure GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, Username: admin, Password: Admin123!) for a production deployment. Update the global settings to use 'https://maps.cityplanning.example.com/geoserver' as the Proxy Base URL, 6 decimals, enabled verbose exception reporting, and UTF-8 character set. In the contact information, set the organization to 'City Planning Department' and the contact person to 'GIS Administrator'. Change the logging profile to 'PRODUCTION_LOGGING'. Verify the configuration by ensuring the WMS GetCapabilities document reflects the new Proxy Base URL. Create a verification report at /home/ga/global_settings_report.txt containing the proxy base URL, the number of decimals, the logging profile, and 'VERIFIED' on separate lines.
